steps.expected: Valid blog route renders post page
steps.observed: URL resolved to http://localhost:4321/blog/shipping-a-minimal-portfolio with post title shown

steps.action: Extract article heading and unique text
steps.expected: Exactly one h1 matches entry title and unique body content is present
steps.observed: h1Count=1, h1Text='Shipping a Minimal Portfolio with Astro', hasUniqueSnippet=true for 'The core idea is straightforward'

assertions.title: Markdown/MDX renders as structured HTML output

steps.expected: Sentinel markdown elements render as HTML (heading, paragraph, list, link, inline code)
steps.observed: Rendered H2 ('Practical defaults that hold up'), list items, hyperlink to https://docs.astro.build, and inline code 'npm run astro check' are present

evidence.network: Page render validated via browser DOM snapshot on loaded route

steps.expected: Date, tags, reading time are shown

steps.action: Match rendered metadata to source frontmatter
steps.expected: Rendered values match entry source values
Post still shows non-empty reading-time metadata

assertions.title: Code blocks render with language-aware highlighting

steps.expected: Code renders in pre > code with language/highlight styling

steps.observed: Rendered code block uses highlighted theme class and token spans

evidence.network: Rendered code block observed on loaded post route

assertions.title: Code overflow is contained and layout stays readable

steps.expected: No page-level horizontal overflow; long code scrolls in block
steps.observed: pageOverflowOk=true, docScrollWidth=1280, docClientWidth=1280, preScrollWidth=1366 > preClientWidth=585 with overflowX='auto'

steps.expected: No page-level horizontal overflow; code remains contained
steps.observed: pageOverflowOk=true, docScrollWidth=390, docClientWidth=390, preScrollWidth=1366 > preClientWidth=322 with overflow containment

evidence.network: Layout checks performed on loaded post route in desktop+mobile viewports

assertions.title: Invalid post routes show not-found semantics

steps.expected: Not-found UI shown, no stale article content, and 404 behavior
steps.observed: Title='Not Found | Portfolio', main H1='Not Found', articleExists=false, in-browser fetch GET /blog/does-not-exist -> 404

steps.expected: Schema-invalid entry route also resolves to not-found semantics
steps.observed: Blocked: no schema-invalid fixture slug was provided or discoverable in this isolated run (only valid blog links rendered: /blog/shipping-a-minimal-portfolio, /blog/astro-content-collection-ordering, /blog/mdx-frontmatter-workflow)

assertions.issues: Unknown-slug path verified; schema-invalid-entry-route portion could not be executed due missing schema-invalid fixture route in assigned environment.

frictions.description: agent-browser 'network requests' returned no captured entries in this run, so HTTP status evidence was captured via in-browser fetch() checks instead.
frictions.resolution: Used browser-evaluated fetch(path) and recorded response status per tested routes.

blockers.description: Schema-invalid blog entry route was required by VAL-BLOG-POST-007, but no schema-invalid fixture slug was available/discoverable through the browser surface in this isolated run.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Enumerated available /blog links from rendered list and tested unknown-slug not-found behavior; schema-invalid-specific route remained unavailable.

summary: Tested 7 assigned assertions for blog post flows: 6 passed and 1 blocked (VAL-BLOG-POST-007 blocked only on schema-invalid-route sub-check; unknown-slug 404 semantics passed).
